title: HERALD CENTER - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK ADVENTIST COMMUNITY SERVICES HERALD CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping-style food pantry and a thrift shop that offers bedding, small household items, personal hygiene supplies, and clothing. Offers community gardening opportunities. Accepts donations for the food pantry and thrift shop. 2710 First Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Food Pantry and Thrift Shop: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm Donation Drop-off: Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-2pm Email (503) 842-4794 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-4794 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Bedding/Linen Clothing Donation Programs Community Gardening Food Donation Programs Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COME TO THE TABLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
